steps.title: Calculate the y-intercept
steps.content:
The y-intercept occurs at $x = 0$. Since $x$ represents months after the end of May 2012, $x = 0$ corresponds to the end of May 2012. Substitute $x = 0$ into the equation:
$$y = -\frac{1}{4}(0)^2 + 2(0) + 29 = 29$$

steps.title: Interpret the y-intercept
steps.content: The y-intercept is 29, which represents the estimated number of scheduled deliveries at the end of May 2012. That matches choice B — B is correct.
